channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: No. 8 Miami rallies from 25 points down to beat California 39-38
item.description: BERKELEY, Calif. (AP) — Halfway through his first season at Miami, Cam Ward has already shown a knack for the dramatic. Ward threw a 5-yard touchdown pass to Elijah Arroyo with 26 seconds left and No.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: The Big Sho: Ohtani hits tying 3-run homer in playoff debut for the Los Angeles Dodgers in NLDS win
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani rewrote the record book during his first season with the Los Angeles Dodgers. Now, he's getting a chance to make more history in his highly anticipated playoff debut.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ohtani homers in playoff debut and the Dodgers rally to beat the Padres 7-5 in NLDS opener
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani hit a three-run homer in his postseason debut, Teoscar Hernández’s two-run single gave Los Angeles its first lead in a playoff game in two years, and the Dodgers beat the San Diego Padres 7-5 in their NL Division Series opener Saturday.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Singleton scores late TD as Arkansas beats No. 4 Tennessee 19-14
item.description: FAYETTEVILLE, Ark. (AP) — Malachi Singleton scored on an 11-yard run with 1:17 remaining to lift Arkansas to a 19-14 win over No. 4 Tennessee on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: In Philadelphia, Chinatown activists rally again to stop development. This time, it's a 76ers arena
item.description: Chinatown activists are rallying to block a planned $1.3 billion arena for the Philadelphia 76ers that recently won the support of Mayor Cherelle Parker.
item.dc:creator: Maryclaire Dale, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Yankees, Royals make MLB history in wild first game of ALDS
item.description: The New York Yankees survived a wild game against the Kansas City Royals on Saturday to take Game 1 of the American League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chaos hits AP poll with 4 teams ranked in the top 11 losing to unranked opponents
item.description: Vanderbilt’s stunning upset of No. 1 Alabama that led to crazed fans marching the goal posts through the streets of Nashville was just the appetizer.
item.dc:creator: Josh Dubow, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Washington pulls away in 4th quarter to beat No. 10 Michigan 27-17 in title game rematch
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) — Washington quarterback Will Rogers watched the final seconds tick away and wondered if the field at Husky Stadium was about to be flooded with purple.
item.dc:creator: TIM BOOTH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Verdugo's go-ahead single and acrobatic catch lift Yankees over Royals 6-5 in ALDS opener
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Alex Verdugo hit a tiebreaking single in the seventh inning and saved at least one run with a sliding catch along the left-field line, boosting the New York Yankees over the Kansas City Royals 6-5 on Saturday night in their AL Division Series opener.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lane Thomas hits 3-run homer, Cleveland's bullpen torments Tigers as Guardians win ALDS opener 7-0
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Lane Thomas hit a three-run homer in a five-run outburst before Detroit got an out, and the Cleveland Guardians unleashed their lights-out bullpen to complete a four-hitter in a 7-0 win over the Tigers in an AL Division Series opener on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mets use another October rally to score 5 runs in 8th and top Phillies 6-2 in Game 1 of NLDS
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Mark Vientos and Brandon Nimmo keyed another late New York comeback, helping the Mets break through for five runs in the eighth inning against a pair of All-Star relievers as they rallied past the Philadelphia Phillies 6-2 on Saturday in Game 1 of their National League Division S
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Keanu Reeves spins out during professional racing debut at Indianapolis
item.description: Famed Hollywood actor Keanu Reeves, perhaps best known for his role in "The Matrix," spun out during his professional racing debut in Indianapolis Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former NFL star and Trump supporter Antonio Brown joins voter-registration effort in key swing state
item.description: Antonio Brown announced in a post on X on Friday that he is looking to get Pennsylvania voters registered for the upcoming election to help support Trump.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ludmila scores in third straight game as Chicago Red Stars down Houston Dash 2-0
item.description: Ludmila scored a goal and earned a penalty shot as the Chicago Red Stars beat the Houston Dash 2-0 on Friday night at Shell Energy Stadium. Ludmila headed in Mallory Pugh's free kick in the 8th minute to get things started. It was the third straight game she had scored a goal.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bronny James begins his Lakers career with a preseason debut. LeBron won't join until the next game
item.description: PALM DESERT, Calif. (AP) — Bronny James played in his first NBA preseason game Friday night, but LeBron James wasn't in uniform with him when the Lakers hosted Minnesota in the first of Los Angeles' two weekend games in the Coachella Valley.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Greg Landry, former Detroit Lions quarterback and assistant coach, dead at 77
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Greg Landry, the former Detroit Lions quarterback and assistant coach, has died. He was 77. The Lions announced Landry's death on social media Friday. No cause of death was given.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Yankees broadcaster rips team's fans who have been rooting for Mets during miraculous run: 'Please stop!'
item.description: New York Yankees play-by-play announcer Michael Kay has had enough of Yankees fans rooting for the crosstown rival Mets during their magical October run.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Utes to play baseball at Smith's Ballpark next season
item.description: The University of Utah has partnered up with Salt Lake City and the Salt Lake Bees to have the Utes play baseball at Smith's Ballpark during the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz counting on Hendricks and George to take big strides
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With its commitment to a youth movement, the Utah Jazz are counting on Keyonte George and Taylor Hendricks to both take big strides in their second seasons this year. After playing in 75 games as a rookie, George wore down a bit at the end of the year.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bowles says the Buccaneers will learn from their mistakes in overtime loss to division-rival Falcons
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers have no one to blame but themselves for failing to take advantage of an opportunity to tighten their grip on first place in the NFC South.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Viral disease outbreak leads to several horses being euthanized at Los Alamitos
item.description: An outbreak of a potentially fatal viral disease at Los Alamitos Race Course has led to seven race horses being euthanized, officials have confirmed. Announced in an advisory on Thursday, the California Horse Racing Board said it was notified of an outbreak of Equine Infectious Anemia on Sept.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Grand Junction softball pours it on Palisade for big league win
item.description: With a clear blue sky and beautiful Mt. Garfield as the backdrop at Palisade High School, it was the Grand Junction Tigers show on the softball field.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Indiana Fever star Caitlin Clark a near-unanimous choice as WNBA's Rookie of the Year
item.description: NEW YORK (AP/WGN) — Caitlin Clark has been named the WNBA Rookie of the Year in a near-unanimous vote, giving the Indiana Fever back-to-back winners after Aliyah Boston won the honor last season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Padres beat Braves to advance to NLDS
item.description: The Padres booked their ticket to the National League Division Series on Wednesday, defeating the Atlanta Braves 5-4 in Game 2 of the Wild Card Series at Petco Park.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5
